topic.Scholarship and Softball: Summary: Speaker2 excitedly shares the news that they've received a full ride scholarship to attend U.S.C. next year to play softball, leaving both speakers feeling thrilled and amazed by this incredible opportunity.

summary:
Speaker2 opens the conversation by announcing they received a full-ride scholarship to USC to play softball (excited). Speaker1 responds with surprise and support (surprise, happiness), and both react positively as they absorb the news (excited, happiness).
